message:
Fix changelog generation by merging into build job

The separate generate job with artifact transfer was causing changelog
entries to be lost. Moving generation steps back into the build job
while keeping them as separate steps for failure visibility.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,48 +17,8 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
-  generate:
-    name: Generate
-    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          submodules: recursive
-
-      - name: Install pnpm
-        run: npm install -g pnpm
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js and pnpm
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "20"
-          cache: "pnpm"
-
-      - name: Install dependencies
-        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod
-
-      - name: Generate changelog
-        run: pnpm generate:changelog
-
-      - name: Generate docs map
-        run: pnpm generate:docs-map
-
-      - name: Upload generated content
-        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          name: generated-content
-          path: |
-            src/content/docs/changelog/
-            src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
-            src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
-            public/sitemap.md
-
   build:
     name: Build
-    needs: generate
-    if: always() && (needs.generate.result == 'success' || needs.generate.result == 'skipped')
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -82,11 +42,13 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
-      - name: Download generated content
+      - name: Generate changelog
         if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
-        with:
-          name: generated-content
+        run: pnpm generate:changelog
+
+      - name: Generate docs map
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
+        run: pnpm generate:docs-map
 
       - name: Setup GitHub Pages
         id: pages
